title: Anchor Backlink Shard (v1)
description: Domain-specific backlinks for a single canon anchor. One file per anchor per domain.

canon_uri.description: Relative path to canon file + anchor fragment (e.g. canon/OT/GEN.md#GEN.1:1)

text_tradition.description: Textual tradition of the canon anchor

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this shard was generated

generator_version.description: Version tag of the backlink builder that produced this shard

source_file.description: Relative path to the source file containing the reference

line_number.description: Line number in the source file where the reference occurs

context.description: Surrounding text providing context for the reference
